decision.summary: No new action: the active daily 79k reach is still live, but the remaining daily and weekly board is too weak to justify adding a second trade late in the session.
decision.rationale: Reconciliation is clean. BTC spot is 78024.65, still sitting close to the upper part of the recent range, but the short-term Binance bias has softened to neutral and open interest remains flat. The active daily 79k reach is still open at roughly 28%, so it remains above the discarded-for-slot threshold and still occupies the primary daily slot. Beecthor's broader map remains bearish around the 78k-81k resistance band, but the nearest bearish daily alternative, 77k dip, is only around 22%, which is below the preferred entry band and too weak to justify opening a second same-day position with only six hours left. The next bullish strike, 80k reach, is only about 5%, and the weekly frontier is even weaker, with 80k weekly reach around 3.8% and only six hours left in the weekly period anyway. The disciplined move is to hold the existing 79k reach and avoid forcing any additional late-session exposure.
